Author: XeldarAlz
Name: Doman Mahjong Solver
Punchline: Doman Mahjong helper — hints or auto-play.
Description:
A helper for Doman Mahjong at the Gold Saucer. Two modes:

• Hint mode (default): shows the best tile to discard and a short explanation. You still click every move.
• Auto-play: the plugin watches the table and clicks for you with natural pacing.

Starts off by default. You must accept a short notice before auto-play can be turned on, and you can switch back to hints or turn it off at any time from the plugin window.
Changelog: v0.0.0.20 — UI overhaul. Plugin and developer windows were rebuilt around a shared Theme module: stacked surface cards, rounded status/mode/seat pills, a three-way mode selector (Off / Hints / Auto-play) with title+subtitle labels, and hand tiles rendered as actual suit-colored shapes (digits + m/p/s letter, 東南西北白發中 glyphs for honors) instead of monospaced text. The developer console is now tabbed (Status / Addon / Actions / Diagnostics) with a persistent last-dispatch toast, replacing the single long-scroll panel. Seat labels are localized to You/Right/Across/Left for end users (kept compact in the debug pick table), and the main window's ukeire line now reads "N kinds · M tiles" instead of the "Nk/Mw" abbreviation. The in-world discard highlight pulls its green/amber from the same palette as the windows so all three surfaces stay visually consistent. Dalamud's command panel also gets a one-line summary instead of the previous wall-of-subcommands, and /mjauto help prints only end-user commands by default — the full developer / capture / reverse-engineering reference shows only when Developer tools are enabled. All subcommands still work as before. No gameplay or detection changes.
